ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy data record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was recorded */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Time period the data was recorded (1-24) */,
  "value" REAL /* Energy consumption or generation value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., solar, wind, fossil fuels) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of energy source (e.g., renewable, non-renewable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_type" TEXT /* Type of region (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was recorded */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Time period the data was recorded (1-24) */,
  "value" REAL /* Energy consumption value */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted energy consumption value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_generation" (
  "generation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy generation record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was recorded */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Time period the data was recorded (1-24) */,
  "value" REAL /* Energy generation value */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted energy generation value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_generation_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, operator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_energy_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., pdf, csv) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the forecast model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy forecast */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast model used */,
  "energy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy data being forecasted */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was generated */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* Forecasted energy value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the forecast was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecast_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_forecasts_energy_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("energy_id")
)
